title: Family cabinet meeting — last Sunday
summary: Decisions made and follow-ups assigned during the weekly family alignment meeting.
body_html:
Cabinet meeting notes — Sun Mar 31

Brief summary, action items below.

Decisions

  • Spring break: leaving Friday April 11 morning, back Sunday April 13 night. Three nights at the cabin.
  • Pip's birthday party: 12 kids, 2-4pm Saturday April 26, at the park if it's dry, indoors at the community center if not. Decision deadline for venue: Wednesday April 23.
  • New stroller: ordered the Uppababy V2 in noir, arrives April 12.

Open items punted to next week

  1. Whether to enroll Pip in summer reading camp (tuition due April 30)
  2. Replace the dishwasher or wait for the year-end model refresh
  3. Holiday week with Boris's parents — they're asking which week works

Action items

OwnerActionDue
BorisBook the cabin (call by Tuesday)Apr 8
RachelSend party invites once the date is lockedApr 14
BorisGet backup community-center reservation for April 26Apr 21
RachelReply to Boris's parents about holiday weekApr 10

Next cabinet meeting: Sunday April 7 at 7:30pm.
